description: Define and run multi-container applications with Docker.

arguments.name: Abort on Container Exit
arguments.description: Stops all containers if any container was stopped. Incompatible with -d

arguments.name: Abort on Container Failure
arguments.description: Stops all containers if any container exited with failure. Incompatible with -d

arguments.name: Always Recreate Deps
arguments.description: Recreate dependent containers. Incompatible with --no-recreate

arguments.name: Attach
arguments.description: Restrict attaching to the specified services. Incompatible with --attach-dependencies

arguments.name: Attach Dependencies
arguments.description: Automatically attach to log output of dependent services

arguments.name: Build
arguments.description: Build images before starting containers

arguments.name: Detach
arguments.description: Detached mode: Run containers in the background

arguments.name: Exit Code From
arguments.description: Return the exit code of the selected service container. Implies --abort-on-container-exit

arguments.name: Force Recreate
arguments.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed

arguments.name: Menu
arguments.description: Enable interactive shortcuts when running attached. Incompatible with --detach

arguments.name: No Attach
arguments.description: Do not attach (stream logs) to the specified services

arguments.name: No Build
arguments.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing

arguments.name: No Color
arguments.description: Produce monochrome output

arguments.name: No Deps
arguments.description: Don't start linked services

arguments.name: No Log Prefix
arguments.description: Don't print prefix in logs

arguments.name: No Recreate
arguments.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

arguments.name: No Start
arguments.description: Don't start the services after creating them

arguments.name: Pull
arguments.description: Pull image before running

arguments.name: Quiet Pull
arguments.description: Pull without printing progress information

arguments.name: Remove Orphans
arguments.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

arguments.name: Renew Anon Volumes
arguments.description: Recreate anonymous volumes instead of retrieving data from the previous containers

arguments.name: Scale
arguments.description: Scale SERVICE to NUM instances. Overrides the scale setting in the Compose file

arguments.name: Timeout
arguments.description: Use this timeout in seconds for container shutdown

arguments.name: Timestamps
arguments.description: Show timestamps

arguments.name: Wait
arguments.description: Wait for services to be running|healthy. Implies detached mode

arguments.name: Wait Timeout
arguments.description: Maximum duration to wait for the project to be running|healthy

arguments.name: Watch
arguments.description: Watch source code and rebuild/refresh containers when files are updated

arguments.name: Remove Images
arguments.description: Remove images used by services

arguments.name: Remove Orphans
arguments.description: Remove containers for services not defined in the Compose file

arguments.name: Timeout
arguments.description: Specify a shutdown timeout in seconds

arguments.name: Volumes
arguments.description: Remove named volumes declared in the volumes section of the Compose file

arguments.name: Build Arg
arguments.description: Set build-time variables for services

arguments.name: Compress
arguments.description: Compress the build context using gzip

arguments.name: Force Remove
arguments.description: Always remove intermediate containers

arguments.name: Memory
arguments.description: Set memory limit for the build container. Not supported by BuildKit

arguments.name: No Cache
arguments.description: Do not use cache when building the image

arguments.name: No Remove
arguments.description: Do not remove intermediate containers after a successful build

arguments.name: Parallel
arguments.description: Build images in parallel. DEPRECATED

arguments.name: Progress
arguments.description: Set type of progress output

arguments.name: Pull
arguments.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image

arguments.name: Push
arguments.description: Push service images

arguments.name: Quiet
arguments.description: Don't print anything to STDOUT

arguments.name: SSH
arguments.description: Set SSH authentications used when building service images

arguments.name: With Dependencies
arguments.description: Also build dependencies (transitively)

arguments.name: Service Ports

arguments.name: User
arguments.description: Run as specified username or uid
